questions.question: What is the primary objective of feature engineering in machine learning, and provide an example of a feature engineering technique?
questions.hint: A feature engineering technique is a method used to extract relevant features from raw data that can improve the performance of a machine learning model.

questions.question: Explain the difference between PCA (Principal Component Analysis) and t-SNE (t-distributed Stochastic Neighbor Embedding) in terms of their applications and suitability for dimensionality reduction.
questions.hint: Provide examples of when to use each technique in practice.

questions.question: A dataset with 1000 features has a correlation matrix showing that 99% of the features are highly correlated with each other. Which dimensionality reduction technique would you recommend and why?
questions.hint: Consider the type of data and the characteristics of the correlation matrix.
